sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: LIBERTY LATIN AMERICA SCHEDULES INVESTOR CALL FOR SECOND QUARTER 2024 RESULTS
feed.summary: Liberty Latin America Ltd. (NASDAQ: LILA and LILAK) announced it will release its second quarter 2024 financial results on Tuesday, August 6, 2024, after the NASDAQ market close. The company will host an investor call the following day, Wednesday, August 7, 2024, at 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time, to discuss its results and business. A webcast and investor presentation will be available on the Liberty Latin America website.

feed.title: The Technical Signals Behind (MDEV) That Institutions Follow
feed.summary: This article analyzes the technical signals for First Trust Indxx Medical Devices Etf (NASDAQ: MDEV), indicating weak near-term sentiment but an exceptional 11.5:1 risk-reward setup. It outlines three AI-generated trading strategies—position trading, momentum breakout, and risk hedging—tailored for different risk profiles and holding periods, based on multi-timeframe signal analysis. The report highlights support and resistance levels across near-term, mid-term, and long-term horizons, suggesting potential entry and exit points for institutional traders.

feed.title: Freedom Capital Raised Prologis, Inc. (PLD)'s Target to $138, Cites Portfolio Strength Despite Downgrade
feed.summary: Freedom Capital Markets has raised its price target for Prologis, Inc. (PLD) to $138, despite downgrading the stock from Buy to Hold due to valuation concerns. This adjustment follows a strong Q4 report from PLD which highlighted the quality of its portfolio and robust business model amid a stabilizing U.S. industrial real estate market. Separately, BMO Capital Markets also increased its price target for PLD to $123, citing improving near-term earnings and strong institutional support.

feed.title: UBS raises Amgen (AMGN) target as pharma and biotech setup improves
feed.summary: UBS has increased its price target for Amgen (AMGN) to $326, maintaining a Buy rating. This adjustment reflects an improved outlook for the pharmaceutical and biotechnology sector, suggesting Amgen is well-positioned within this evolving environment.

feed.title: Horizon Kinetics buys Texas Pacific Land (TPL) share at $350 By Investing.com
feed.summary: Horizon Kinetics Asset Management LLC, a ten-percent owner of Texas Pacific Land Corp (NYSE:TPL), recently acquired 1 share of common stock for $350.70. This purchase comes amidst other significant developments for Texas Pacific Land, including a strategic partnership with Bolt Data & Energy and an upcoming three-for-one stock split. KeyBanc also initiated coverage with an Overweight rating, highlighting the company's strong land and royalty interests.

feed.title: Bank of America Trims McDonald’s (MCD) Target as Oppenheimer Turns Bullish
feed.summary: Bank of America recently lowered its price target for McDonald's (MCD) to $344 while maintaining a Neutral rating. In contrast, Oppenheimer upgraded McDonald's to Outperform with a $355 price target, citing underestimated unit growth, innovation, and potential stabilization of the lower-end consumer market as "golden opportunities." The article highlights these differing analyst views on McDonald's investment prospects.

feed.title: The Truth About Ross Stores Inc.: Is This ‘Cheap Drip’ Stock Seriously Undervalued or Overhyped?
feed.summary: This article analyzes Ross Stores Inc. (ROST), an off-price retailer, examining whether its stock is undervalued or overhyped. It highlights Ross's successful business model, which thrives on selling name brands at discount prices by leveraging excess inventory and maintaining low operational costs, notably by avoiding extensive e-commerce. The analysis compares Ross with competitors like TJX Companies and Burlington, concluding that while Ross is not a "meme stock" for quick gains, it represents a solid investment for those seeking a steady, cash-generating company in the value retail sector.

feed.title: Norfolk Southern Reports Q4, Full Year 2025 Results
feed.summary: Norfolk Southern Corp. announced its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year 2025. Fourth-quarter railway operating revenues were $3 billion, down 2% year-over-year, with diluted earnings per share at $2.87. For the full year, railway operating revenues reached $12.2 billion, an increase of $57 million, and diluted earnings per share rose 10% to $12.75, reflecting strengthened railroad foundations, cost commitments, and safety improvements.

feed.title: Royal Caribbean keeps Discovery-class details under wraps
feed.summary: Royal Caribbean International President/CEO Michael Bayley stated that much of the speculation regarding the size and capacity of the upcoming Discovery-class ships is inaccurate, though he promised they would be "game-changers" like Icon of the Seas. The company plans to release more details in a few months through a multi-city promotional campaign, following their announcement of two firm orders for the new class with deliveries in 2029 and 2032.

feed.title: Southwest CEO: Response to company overhaul 'overwhelmingly positive'
feed.summary: Southwest Airlines leadership, including CEO Bob Jordan and CFO Andrew Watterson, claim customer response to their recent overhaul, which includes assigned seating and baggage fees, has been "overwhelmingly positive." This confidence was expressed during an investor call discussing Q4 and 2025 financial results, despite mixed online sentiment. The airline sees these changes as essential for future revenue growth and meeting customer demands, aiming to attract premium customers.

feed.title: 10 Industrials Stocks With Whale Alerts In Today's Session
feed.summary: This article identifies 10 industrial stocks showing "whale alerts" based on unusual options activity, which can signal significant trading opportunities. These alerts indicate large transactions by institutional investors or "whales," where market estimation of an option's value may diverge from its normal worth. The article details specific call and put option trades for each company, including expiration dates, strike prices, total trade value, and overall sentiment.

feed.title: TXT Q4 Deep Dive: Management Leans on MV-75 Acceleration and Aviation Execution Amid Cautious Guidance
feed.summary: Textron (NYSE: TXT) reported better-than-expected Q4 CY2025 revenue and adjusted EPS, driven by increased aircraft deliveries and strong aftermarket activity, but its shares fell due to cautious guidance for 2026. Management is accelerating the MV-75 program, leading to higher near-term capital expenditures and costs, but expects long-term growth and margin support from productivity improvements and continued aviation strength. The company is also focusing on execution, portfolio discipline, and addressing ongoing supply chain and workforce challenges.

feed.title: JPMorgan Raises IBM Target as Software Growth Drives Q4 Outlook
feed.summary: JPMorgan increased its price target for IBM to $312 from $290, maintaining a Neutral rating, on expectations of strong Q4 results driven by software growth, especially in automation and Red Hat. While acknowledging current share price optimism, JPMorgan noted IBM's strategic focus on AI consulting, having secured $9.5 billion in AI-related business, and its long-term commitment to quantum computing with a goal for a fault-tolerant quantum computer by 2029. Despite IBM's potential, the firm suggests other AI stocks might offer better upside with less risk.

feed.title: Deadline Alert: Klarna Group plc (KLAR) Shareholders Who Lost Money Urged To Contact Glancy Prongay Wolke & Rotter LLP About Securities Fraud Lawsuit
feed.summary: Glancy Prongay Wolke & Rotter LLP is urging shareholders of Klarna Group plc (KLAR) who suffered losses to contact the firm regarding a securities fraud lawsuit. The lawsuit alleges that Klarna made materially false or misleading statements in connection with its September 2025 IPO, particularly concerning the risk of increased loss reserves for its "buy now, pay later" loans. Investors have until February 20, 2026, to file a lead plaintiff motion.

feed.title: Cencora stock upgraded at Morgan Stanley (COR:NYSE)
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley has upgraded Cencora (COR) and raised price targets for its competitors, McKesson Corporation (MCK) and Cardinal Health (CAH). The analyst Erin Wright believes drug distributors are entering a "golden era," justifying a premium valuation for the industry.

feed.title: Landstar System Inc (NASDAQ:LSTR) Posts Mixed Q4 2025 Results with Revenue Miss, EPS Beat
feed.summary: Landstar System Inc (NASDAQ:LSTR) reported mixed financial results for Q4 2025, with revenue of $1.17 billion falling below analyst estimates, while non-GAAP EPS of $1.24 exceeded expectations. The market reacted with a slight decline in LSTR's stock price, weighing the earnings beat against the revenue shortfall. Analysts project a rebound in Q1 2026, with full-year 2026 estimates of $5.12 billion in revenue and $5.56 EPS.

feed.title: Hexcel Corp. (HXL) Declares $0.18 Quarterly Dividend; 0.9% Yield
feed.summary: Hexcel Corp. (NYSE: HXL) has announced a quarterly dividend of $0.18 per share, totaling an annualized dividend of $0.72. This dividend offers an annual yield of 0.9 percent and will be paid on February 17, 2026, to shareholders of record as of February 9, 2026. The ex-dividend date is set for February 6, 2026.

feed.title: Wells Fargo Cuts Verizon (VZ) Target in Wireless Sector Reassessment
feed.summary: Wells Fargo recently lowered its price target for Verizon (VZ) to $41 from $43, while maintaining an Equal Weight rating, following a reassessment of the wireless sector. Despite better-than-expected fourth-quarter subscriber growth, competitive pressures led to sector-wide target reductions. Verizon's investment case relies on its consistent dividend increases for 19 years and a strong balance sheet management, distinguishing it from companies pursuing riskier, debt-laden AI ventures.

feed.title: Argus Raises Travelers (TRV) Target After Strong Q4 Earnings Beat
feed.summary: Argus analyst Kevin Heal raised his price target for The Travelers Companies, Inc. (TRV) to $295 from $287, maintaining a Buy rating after the company's strong fourth-quarter earnings significantly exceeded expectations. This performance was attributed to lower catastrophe losses, increased net investment income, and Travelers' ability to raise prices on auto and homeowners policies while maintaining customer retention. The company's underlying profitability also improved, with its combined ratio declining by 1.8 percentage points to 82.2%.

feed.title: Lockheed Martin to quadruple THAAD missile interceptor production under Pentagon deal
feed.summary: Lockheed Martin has signed a framework agreement with the Pentagon to increase production of Terminal High Altitude Area Defense (THAAD) missile interceptors from 96 to 400 per year. This expansion addresses Pentagon concerns about missile threats and potential interceptor shortages, especially given current deployments in the Middle East and Israel. The deal awaits Congressional funding approval, and Lockheed Martin has already broken ground on a new facility to support the anticipated production ramp-up.

feed.title: Smith, director at Teledyne, sells $2.48 million in stock
feed.summary: Michael T. Smith, a director at Teledyne Technologies, recently sold 4,000 shares of the company's common stock for $2.48 million. These sales occurred on January 28 and 29, 2026, at a price of $621 per share. Following these transactions, Smith directly holds 47,128 shares and his wife owns 200 shares.

feed.title: Teledyne Technologies (NYSE:TDY) Director Michael Smith Sells 2,469 Shares
feed.summary: Teledyne Technologies Director Michael Smith sold 2,469 shares of the company's stock for over $1.5 million on January 29th, reducing his holdings by 4.96%. The sale occurred after Teledyne beat quarterly earnings expectations and provided strong FY2026 guidance. The stock is currently trading around $622, has a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating, and is heavily owned by institutional investors.

feed.title: MGE Energy and Madison Gas and Electric end mortgage indenture after bond redemption
feed.summary: MGE Energy and its subsidiary Madison Gas and Electric Company have officially satisfied and discharged their Indenture of Mortgage and Deed of Trust, originally established in 1946. This action follows the redemption of all outstanding $1.2 million of their 7.70% First Mortgage Bonds due 2028, eliminating the lien on Madison Gas and Electric's utility plant assets. Concurrently, Madison Gas and Electric has also issued $90 million in new unsecured senior notes across three series with staggered maturities and varying interest rates.

feed.title: Top Performing Leveraged/Inverse ETFs: 01/25/2026
feed.summary: This article lists the top 10 performing leveraged and inverse ETFs for the week ending January 25, 2026. The top performers include natural gas, gold, and silver ETFs, as well as leveraged ETFs for AMD and Ether. Explanations for their strong performance, such as weather shifts, safe-haven demand, or company-specific news, are provided for each.

feed.title: First Bancorp (NASDAQ:FBNC) Insider Sells $143,150.00 in Stock
feed.summary: First Bancorp (NASDAQ:FBNC) Director Mary Clara Capel recently sold 2,500 shares of the company's stock for $143,150, reducing her stake by 8.19%. The company reported strong Q4 EPS of $1.19, beating estimates, but revenue fell short; however, it raised its quarterly dividend to $0.24 per share, marking a positive change in its dividend policy. Analysts currently rate First Bancorp a "Moderate Buy" with a consensus price target of $58.00.

feed.title: Kroger opening new store in Newport's West End
feed.summary: Kroger is opening a new 50,000 square-foot grocery store at 20 West 6th Street in Newport's West End on January 30th. This marks the first large grocery store in the neighborhood in decades and will include a pharmacy, various specialty counters, and 230 parking spaces. An 8,000 square-foot Kroger Wine & Spirits Shop is also planned to open nearby later in the year.

feed.title: Palo Alto Networks, Inc. completed the acquisition of Chronosphere, Inc. from a group of shareholders.
feed.summary: Palo Alto Networks, Inc. has finalized its acquisition of Chronosphere, Inc. from a group of shareholders. The deal, valued at $3.4 billion with a cash consideration and replacement equity awards of $3.35 billion, was completed on January 29, 2026. Chronosphere, an observability platform provider with over $160 million in annual recurring revenue as of September 2025, will see its team join Palo Alto Networks.

feed.title: NextEra bets on gas as data center pipeline remains steady at about 15 GW
feed.summary: NextEra Energy is focusing on natural gas to power future data centers, aiming for 15 GW of new generation by 2035, with 6 GW from gas-fired resources. The company's CEO, John Ketchum, stated intentions to potentially double this goal and has recently acquired gas infrastructure assets to support this strategy. While investing heavily in gas, NextEra also continues to expand its renewables and storage backlog, securing solar panels through 2029.

feed.title: Lululemon Blames Customers Again After See-Through Tights Fiasco
feed.summary: Lululemon is again facing a crisis over see-through leggings, similar to an incident over a decade ago. The company's chief brand and product activation officer reportedly told staff that customers needed to size up and wear skin-toned underwear for their new "Get Low" tights, a response critics are calling a deflection from product defects. This comes as Lululemon's stock has dropped, sales growth is slowing, its CEO is departing, and activist investors are pushing for significant changes.

feed.title: AMD Gears Up to Report Q4 Earnings: Here's Why the Stock is a Buy
feed.summary: Advanced Micro Devices (AMD) is poised to release its fourth-quarter 2025 earnings, with expectations of significant growth in revenues and earnings per share, driven by strong demand for its Data Center, Client, and Gaming segments, particularly EPYC processors and Instinct accelerators. Despite fierce competition from NVIDIA and Intel and a somewhat stretched valuation, AMD's "AI Everywhere, for Everyone" strategy, expanding AI portfolio, and rich partner base position it for continued growth, earning it a Zacks Rank #2 (Buy) and a Growth Score of B. The company's future growth is further supported by its anticipated leadership in yotta-scale computing and a substantial projected increase in its data center AI revenues.

feed.title: Lockheed Martin transfers $943 million in new pension buyout while lawsuit remains pending
feed.summary: Lockheed Martin has transferred $943 million in a new pension buyout, even as a related lawsuit continues. The move was reported by Rob Kozlowski on January 29, 2026. This action highlights ongoing financial maneuvering by the defense contractor concerning its pension obligations.

feed.title: W.W. Grainger, Inc. Plans Quarterly Dividend of $2.26 (NYSE:GWW)
feed.summary: W.W. Grainger, Inc. has declared a quarterly dividend of $2.26 per share, maintaining a consistent track record of dividend increases for 55 consecutive years with a low payout ratio of approximately 20.3%. This announcement follows solid financial results including a beat on EPS and revenue growth, and analysts project continued strong earnings per share for the company.

feed.title: Tractor Supply Q4 Sales Rise 3% but Miss Expectations
feed.summary: Tractor Supply's Q4 sales increased by 3.3% to $3.9 billion but fell short of expectations due to a shift in consumer spending where discretionary purchases moderated. Despite this, the company saw a full-year net sales increase of 4.3% to $15.52 billion and plans to open approximately 100 new stores in 2026, forecasting continued sales growth. Essential categories remained resilient, and the retailer focused on expanding its presence in the farm and ranch channel.

feed.title: Enphase Energy to Report Q4 Earnings: Here's What to Expect
feed.summary: Enphase Energy (ENPH) is scheduled to release its fourth-quarter 2025 earnings on February 3rd. The company's performance is anticipated to be bolstered by new product launches, strategic partnerships, and strong microinverter shipments, despite expected softness in the European market and tariff-driven margin pressures on battery cell packs. Zacks analysts predict an earnings beat for ENPH, with an Earnings ESP of +6.54% and a Zacks Rank #3.

feed.title: Earnings call transcript: Waste Management misses Q4 2025 EPS forecast
feed.summary: Waste Management (WM) reported Q4 2025 earnings, missing EPS and revenue forecasts with an EPS of $1.93 against an anticipated $1.95, and revenue of $6.31 billion against $6.39 billion. Despite the misses, the company showed strong operational performance by improving its operating EBITDA margin by 40 basis points for the full year and increasing free cash flow by nearly 27% to $2.94 billion. Waste Management expects continued strong growth in 2026, with operating EBITDA projected to be between $8.15 billion and $8.25 billion, and free cash flow growth of nearly 30% to $3.8 billion, driven by operational excellence, sustainability investments, and integration of its Healthcare Solutions business.

feed.title: Tractor Supply reins in guidance after weak finish to the year
feed.summary: Tractor Supply missed its Q4 expectations with net sales up 3.3% and comps nearly flat, while net income dropped almost 4%. The weak performance was attributed to softer demand for discretionary goods, fewer severe weather events, and increased tariffs and promotional costs impacting margins. Consequently, the retailer has reined in its outlook for the current year, expecting more modest growth in sales and net income than analyst forecasts.

feed.title: Hexcel Corporation (NYSE:HXL) Increases Dividend to $0.18 Per Share
feed.summary: Hexcel Corporation (NYSE:HXL) has announced an increase in its quarterly dividend to $0.18 per share, up from $0.17, representing a 5.9% increase. The dividend will be paid on February 17th to shareholders of record on February 9th, with an annualized payout of $0.68 and a yield of 0.8%. The company recently reported strong earnings, beating analyst expectations with $0.52 EPS and $491.3 million in revenue, and its dividend is well-covered by earnings with a payout ratio of 27.0%.

feed.title: Apple acquires audio AI startup Q.ai
feed.summary: Apple announced on Thursday it has acquired Q.ai, an Israeli startup focused on artificial intelligence technology for audio. Q.ai's founding team, including CEO Aviad Maizels, will join Apple. The startup's technology is expected to be integrated into Apple's products, potentially enhancing features like understanding whispered speech and improving audio in challenging environments, similar to the previous acquisition of PrimeSense which led to advancements in facial recognition for iPhones.

feed.title: RSI Alert: N-able (NABL) Now Oversold
feed.summary: Shares of N-able Inc (NABL) have entered oversold territory with an RSI reading of 29.5, hitting a low of $6.08 per share. This indicates a potential buying opportunity for bullish investors as the recent selling pressure may be exhausting. The current RSI for the S&P 500 ETF (SPY) is 47.3.

feed.title: Blackstone-Backed Liftoff Mobile Seeks $762 Million in US IPO
feed.summary: Liftoff Mobile Inc., a company backed by Blackstone Inc. that specializes in mobile in-app advertising, is pursuing an initial public offering (IPO) aiming to raise up to $762 million. The company plans to offer 25.4 million shares at a price range of $26 to $30 per share. At the top end of this range, Liftoff Mobile would achieve a market valuation of $5.2 billion.

feed.title: Marcus & Millichap Completes Sale of Mixed-Use Property in Newtown Square near Philadelphia
feed.summary: Marcus & Millichap announced the sale of the Fieldstone Building, an 18,000-square-foot mixed-use property in Newtown Square, Pennsylvania, for over $2.1 million. The property, featuring 11 residential units and four commercial suites, drew significant market interest due to its location, existing cash flow, and development potential. Vince Peruto of Marcus & Millichap's Philadelphia office brokered the deal between the private seller and buyer.

feed.title: FICO's AI decision platform lands 2026 Gartner 'Leader' rating
feed.summary: FICO has been named a Leader in the 2026 Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for Decision Intelligence Platforms, recognized for its Ability to Execute and Completeness of Vision. The company's FICO Platform, launched in 2019, is highlighted for empowering enterprises to make faster, smarter, and more explainable decisions using unified decisioning intelligence. This recognition underscores FICO's commitment to leveraging AI for real-world decision-making across various industries.

feed.title: FICO Named a Leader in 2026 Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for Decision Intelligence Platforms
feed.summary: FICO has been recognized by Gartner as a Leader in the 2026 Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for Decision Intelligence Platforms, evaluated based on its Ability to Execute. This recognition underscores FICO's commitment to empowering enterprises with AI and real-world decision-making capabilities through its FICO® Platform. The platform enables businesses to make faster, smarter, and real-time decisions at scale by unifying decisioning intelligence into dynamic profiles and utilizing a composable architecture.

feed.title: Can Allstate Beat Q4 Earnings on Property-Liability Strength?
feed.summary: Allstate Corporation is expected to report its fourth-quarter 2025 results on February 4, 2026, with analysts forecasting a significant year-over-year jump in earnings and revenue. The company has a strong track record of beating earnings estimates, and its Q4 results are anticipated to benefit from growth in net premiums earned, higher net investment income, and improved underwriting income in Property-Liability, despite rising expenses.

feed.title: Lam Research Corp (NASDAQ:LRCX) Exceeds Market Expectations
feed.summary: Lam Research Corp (NASDAQ:LRCX) reported strong fiscal Q2 2026 results, surpassing market expectations for both earnings and revenue. The company achieved record revenues in 2025, with significant growth in its WFE and CSPG segments, driven by AI transformation. Looking ahead, Lam Research anticipates continued growth for Q1 2026, with revenue projected between $5.70 billion, plus or minus $300 million, exceeding consensus estimates.

feed.title: 5 Revealing Analyst Questions From Intuitive Surgical's Q4 Earnings Call
feed.summary: Intuitive Surgical exceeded Q4 expectations, driven by increased global procedure volumes and demand for its new da Vinci 5 system, particularly in international markets. The article highlights key analyst questions from the earnings call, focusing on FDA approval for cardiac procedures, ASC adoption strategies, gross margin dynamics, and addressing cost competition. Upcoming catalysts include the adoption of da Vinci 5, expansion into ASCs, and navigating competition and regulatory changes in international markets.

feed.title: Toyota becomes T-Mobile Arena’s first auto sponsor, with SUV giveaways
feed.summary: T-Mobile Arena has named Southern Nevada Toyota Dealers as its newest Founding Partner and first Official Automotive Sponsor. This multi-year agreement, facilitated by AEG Global Partnerships, will provide Toyota prominent brand visibility, including signage, vehicle displays, and naming rights to a VIP suite entrance. Fans can also look forward to interactive activations, exclusive giveaways like a 4Runner sweepstakes, and community-driven initiatives.

feed.title: Inside HOKA's lightest marathon shoe yet: the $275 Cielo X1 3.0
feed.summary: HOKA, a division of Deckers Brands, has launched the Cielo X1 3.0, its lightest super shoe designed for race day. This new model focuses on minimizing weight and maximizing performance through features like a carbon fiber plate, responsive PEBA foam, and a lightweight, breathable design. Elite HOKA athletes have already tested and achieved notable results with the shoe in major marathons and half marathons.

feed.title: WEC Energy Group to announce 2025 fourth-quarter and year-end financial results Feb. 5
feed.summary: WEC Energy Group (NYSE: WEC) will release its 2025 fourth-quarter and full-year earnings before the stock market opens on Thursday, Feb. 5, 2026. A conference call for investors and security analysts is scheduled for the same day at 1 p.m. Central time, with detailed financial information available on the company's website by 6:30 a.m. Central time. The company, based in Milwaukee, serves 4.7 million customers across Wisconsin, Illinois, Michigan, and Minnesota.

feed.title: A.O. Smith Q4 & FY 2025 slides: Record EPS despite China headwinds
feed.summary: A.O. Smith Corporation reported record adjusted earnings per share of $3.85 for full-year 2025, a 6% increase from the previous year, despite facing headwinds in its Chinese operations. The company's North America segment was the primary growth driver, and it strategically acquired Leonard Valve to expand its water management reach. A.O. Smith projects continued growth and shareholder returns for 2026, though challenges in China are expected to persist.
